description:
central locking (with remote control)
front passenger airbag isolation
ISOFIX child seat preparation (on rear seat)
2x mirrors in sunshields (enlighted)
electrically adjustable mirrors (heated mirrors, folding)
adjustable seat height (driver's seat)
cup holders (in the front, in the back)
front armrest (with compartment)
interior mats (textile, rubber)
pockets on backside of the front seats
steering wheel adjustment (height and depth)
car stereo (with USB interface, original)
tire pressure monitoring system
comes with the carsummer tireswinter tires (spike tires)alloy wheels
saloon and luggage department isolation net
